productDisplayName: Rockport Men CV Toe HI Charcoal Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, the CV Cap Toe Hi ankle leather boots from rockport makes for a great addition to your winter wardrobe. UpperSoft leather upper with a high ankle for better support to the lower legLacing system for a snug, customised FitCushioned collar with adiPRENE inserts in the footbed for a custom fit and impact protectionSuede inner lining for soft comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleEVA midsole for all day comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durability, with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementshoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
